overall_rationale: Due to limitations in available data, I'll propose examining ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP. It's a key player in the semiconductor industry, where TSMC is a major supplier. Reviewing 10-K and 10-Q filings over the last three years will likely reveal insights into how they describe dependencies on suppliers like TSMC.
